summary: Frontend testing completed for Copay Checkbox Conditional Display and Scheduled Delivery features. All 6 features verified as working correctly.

frontend: Copay checkbox only shows on delivery cards when order has copay_amount > 0 - PASSED
Orders without copay have POD button enabled by default (green, not disabled) - PASSED
Scheduled delivery tab visible in pharmacy Create Delivery Modal (4 tabs: Next Day, Same Day, Priority, Scheduled) - PASSED
Scheduled delivery shows $9 flat rate badge - PASSED
Scheduled delivery shows 8AM-10PM time window badge - PASSED
Scheduled delivery shows Min 15+ packages badge - PASSED
Scheduled delivery shows Local only badge - PASSED
Date picker appears for scheduled delivery selection - PASSED
Scheduled delivery description: 'Schedule deliveries for a future date. Local deliveries only.' - PASSED
Admin Pricing page shows Scheduled Bulk Delivery card - PASSED
Admin shows $9.00 base price for scheduled delivery - PASSED
Admin shows Min 15 packages constraint (amber color) - PASSED
Admin shows Local Only badge - PASSED
Admin scheduled delivery marked as Active - PASSED

scheduled_delivery_pharmacy.location: Pharmacy Portal -> New Delivery -> Scheduled tab
ui_elements: Helper text: 'Choose a date at least 1 day in advance'

card_details.name: Scheduled Bulk Delivery
card_details.description: Schedule delivery for a future date. Local deliveries only, minimum 15 packages. Full day window 8AM-10PM.

critical_code_review_comments: DeliveryCard component correctly implements conditional copay checkbox: hasCopay = (delivery.copay_amount || 0) > 0
POD button correctly uses canCompletePod = hasCopay ? copayCollected : true for default enabled state
CreateDeliveryModal correctly implements Tabs component with 4 tabs including Scheduled
Scheduled tab correctly validates minimum_packages before submission
PricingManagement correctly displays scheduled delivery type with all constraints
context_for_next_testing_agent: Copay checkbox conditional display and Scheduled delivery features are fully functional. Copay checkbox only appears when delivery.copay_amount > 0 (tested: 3/4 cards showed checkbox, 1 without copay had POD enabled by default). Scheduled delivery tab in pharmacy portal shows $9 flat rate, 8AM-10PM window, Min 15+ packages, Local only badges with date picker. Admin pricing shows the same constraints.
